Variants._doc: ADR-0059 §15.5 + PRR-249. Flip BagrutSeedToLlmEnabled=true ONLY after Shaker + counsel sign §6 of the legal-delta memo. Until then the source-anchored variant flow is implementation-complete but gated: GenerateVariantsJobStrategy throws SOURCE_ANCHORED_VARIANTS_DISABLED, the admin SPA banner explains the gate. See docs/engineering/feature-flags.md.

Gemini.Comment: ApiKey is sourced from environment via docker-compose (Ocr__Gemini__ApiKey, set in repo-root .env). Do NOT paste keys into this tracked file.
